sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95439" key="skwriopoii/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκωριο-ποιία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n95439.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making of dross</tr_>, prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκοροπ-</foreign> in Zos.Alch.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.214B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
